channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'The Trojan Teddy Bear': The promise and peril of childhood in the age of AI
item.description: AI is moving beyond chatbots into toys and robots designed to befriend children. A child-development expert says the technology offers...

item.title: The U.S. is set to reinstate a blockade over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. military announced it will begin its blockade of Iranian ships over the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, as Iran vowed to assert its own control.

item.title: Platner's supporters left unsettled as Maine Democrats rush to pick his successor
item.description: Graham Platner's progressive campaign energized Maine voters. After his withdrawal, his backers face a difficult choice.

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump threatens tolls and blockade in Strait of Hormuz; federal agents kill a man in Maine; states sue to block Paramount...
